PropertySetConfig.label: TextBlock6
PropertySetConfig.text:
Please provide the following documentation to complete the full application:

  1. Diagram of the Premises
    • Dimensions included, Exterior areas should show type of control (fences, walls, entry/exit points etc.) and a seprate diagram for each floor.
  2. Proof of Property Possession (Deed in name of applicat)
  3. Background Information and Financial Documents
    • Individual History Record(s) Form DR 84041-1  for each individual/principal of the establishment
    • Fingerprints taken and submitted to the appropriate Local Licensing Authority.  Vendors includes the following:
      • IdentoGO – https://uenroll.identogo.com/
        • Phone: (844) 539-5539 (toll-free)
      • State Fingerprinting – http://www.statefingerprinting.com

If you do not have the documentation available at this point you will be provided the ability to upload them at a later time however, the Application will not be processed until all the information is provided and the application fees are paid.
